basic_details.job_title: Nagaland University Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Assistant, Field Investigator Posts
basic_details.short_information: Nagaland University has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 3 Project Staff Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate in Social Science with minimum 55% marks for Research Assistant. Graduate in Social Science with minimum 55% marks for Field Investigators.
qualification.details: Research Assistant: Postgraduate in any Social Science discipline with a minimum of 55% marks. Preference will be given to candidates with NET/M.Phil. /Ph.D. Field Investigators: Graduate in any Social Science discipline with a minimum 55% marks. Field Investigators will be involved for short-term fieldwork as required for the project. Due to the nature of the fieldwork, priority will be given to candidates who know the local context well and are fluent in the local dialect, ensuring effective communication and smooth interviews with participants.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 37,000/- per month, Rs. 20,000/- per month

selection_process: Application submission via email Screening/Selection Committee shortlisting Final selection by duly constituted Selection Committee
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Nagaland University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 24-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Nagaland University Project Staff positions?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 24-05-2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: For the Research Assistant position, candidates must have a Postgraduate degree in any Social Science discipline with a minimum of 55% marks. NET/M.Phil./Ph.D. holders will be given preference.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for a Field Investigator?
faq.answer: Field Investigators will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 20,000/-. This is a project-based role with specific fieldwork responsibilities.

faq.question: Q4. How should I submit my application for these positions?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted via email to the Project Director, Dr. Narendra, at [email protected]. Ensure all required documents are in a single merged PDF file.

faq.question: Q5. Are there any specific preferences for Field Investigators?
faq.answer: Yes, priority will be given to candidates who are familiar with the local context and fluent in the local dialect, as this is crucial for effective communication during fieldwork.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for Project Staff positions, comprising 1 Research Assistant and 2 Field Investigators.

faq.question: Q7. Is there an application fee for these posts?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for any of the posts. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q8. What documents do I need to attach with my application?
faq.answer: You need to attach your updated Curriculum Vitae (CV), self-attested scanned copies of all relevant certificates, mark sheets, experience certificates, and supporting documents in a single PDF file.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these project staff roles?
faq.answer: The selection process involves application submission via email, followed by shortlisting by a Screening/Selection Committee, and final selection by a duly constituted Selection Committee.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading.
